subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O God of all creation and Desire of all contingent things! I beseech Thee by the splendorous rays of the Sun of Truth
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا اله الکائنات و مقصود الممکنات اسئلک باشراقات انوار شمس الحقیقة
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
